privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Project Charter document (Ridgeline_DC_Migration_Charter.odt) from synthetic project data embedded in setup_task.sh. Data includes company 'Ridgeline Financial Services, Inc.', migration to AWS, data center transition details (Markley Group facility), budget of 4,200,000 USD, and project structures (7 Heading 1, 6 Heading 2, 4 tables, Table of Contents, footer page numbers). All content keywords verified in embedded JSON: Ridgeline, Migration, Data Center, AWS, 4,200,000, Markley. One contradiction: metadata claims min_file_size_bytes of 8192, but verifier.py implements 5000-byte minimum threshold in export_result.sh.
